answer: The Gladly Model Context Protocol (MCP) server provided by StackOne is a production-ready solution that connects AI agents to Gladly, enabling them to perform read, write, update, and delete operations on customer service data [1]. It includes 65 pre-built actions, managed authentication, and built-in security features, allowing agents to interact with Gladly through standard MCP clients like Claude Desktop, Cursor, or VS Code [1]. By utilizing the Model Context Protocol, this server functions as a universal adapter that lets AI agents discover and execute tools within the Gladly ecosystem to improve service efficiency and data access [1][2].
